prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: 2D battle VFX texture for a Pokemon-style grass attack
Primary request: create a 4-frame horizontal flipbook sprite sheet of a compact emerald impact bloom
Scene/backdrop: transparent background, isolated effect only, no background
Subject: effect only, no Pokemon body, no arena, no UI
Style/medium: premium polished game VFX asset with crisp botanical motion and readable energy structure
Composition/framing: compact centered impact burst with clean transparent alpha, tightly framed for compositing, exactly 4 frames in one horizontal strip
Lighting/mood: bright verdant flash, punchy impact, battle-ready and readable
Color palette: luminous emerald core, fresh leaf-green highlights, pale yellow-green pollen accents, deeper forest-green outer tones
Materials/textures: leaf shard edges, soft pollen haze, vine-like fracture lines, subtle glow, crisp silhouettes
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no environment, no card frame
Avoid: travel streaks, beams, generic energy rays, black background, checkerboard, transparent-preview pattern, solid backdrop, cluttered composition
Important negative constraints: keep it impact-only, keep the bloom compact, do not add a launch trail or projectile body, avoid decorative rings that compete with the bloom
